MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Line 7
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, CSR Not On The Record , D501
Appearances:
No appearance by the plaintiff. No appearance by the defendant.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and with neither side being present, adopts the tentative ruling: DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED as to all causes of action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 7
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, CSR Not On The Record , D501
Appearances:
No appearance by the plaintiff. No appearance by the defendant.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and with neither side being present, adopts the tentative ruling: On the amended demurrer to complaint - Defendant's demurrer is overruled as to all causes of action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
